---
name: Feature request
description: Propose a new behavior in agent-bakery — must cite a US/BR or propose one.
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

### Summary

One sentence. What changes, for whom, why now.

### Spec impact

This project is Spec-Driven Development: a behavior change without a spec
item is a feature without a contract. Pick **one** and link it (or propose a
new one in this PR):

- **Existing user story** — `US-NNN` ([`docs/user-stories.md`](../../docs/user-stories.md))
- **Existing business rule** — `BR-NNN` ([`docs/business-rules.md`](../../docs/business-rules.md))
- **New ADR** — append to [`docs/adr/decisions.md`](../../docs/adr/decisions.md), explain what supersedes (or extends) an existing decision
- **New entity / field** — extend [`docs/domain-model.md`](../../docs/domain-model.md)

If none of the above apply, **stop** and open a Discussions thread instead —
the issue tracker is for actionable work only.

### Proposed behavior

Given / When / Then (copy the US-NNN format). For API/contract changes include
the request/response shape.

### Out of scope

What this proposal intentionally does NOT cover (so reviewers know where the
line is drawn).

### Alternatives considered

What else you considered and why this is better. Optional for small requests.

### Willingness

- [ ] I'm willing to send a PR
- [ ] I just want to spark the discussion
